name: CodexOGCAIG
title: Oncology Guideline and Coverage Authorization (OGCA)
description: Standards-based Oncology Guideline and Coverage Authorization (OGCA) framework covering all cancer types, extending Da Vinci CRD/DTR/PAS with mCODE patient context and computable anti-cancer regimen representation. Breast cancer prior authorization is the first concrete use case and data requirements implementation.
